MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Kun Louie, is present.
Attorney, Warren Woo, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, John Alegre, is present.
Attorney, Anne Nicpon, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem David Brillant, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-29-2010 is vacated.
